text: WebRTC (Web Real-Time Communication) is a W3C standard enabling peer-to-peer audio, video, and data communication between browsers without plugins. It uses DTLS-SRTP for encryption and ICE/STUN/TURN for NAT traversal.

WebRTC (Web Real-Time Communication) is a W3C standard enabling peer-to-peer audio, video, and data communication between browsers without plugins. It uses DTLS-SRTP for encryption and ICE/STUN/TURN for NAT traversal.
